news.title: HCLTech successfully acquires Singapore-based Finergy Solutions.
news.summary: HCLTech successfully acquires Singapore-based Finergy Solutions.

news.title:
Sensex and Nifty opened higher amid diplomacy hopes; Sensex at 79,501.32 (+0.49%), Nifty at 24,607.95 (+0.52%) by 9:45 am.
Coal India (+2.83%), ONGC (+2.67%), Reliance (+2.33%) led gains; Max Healthcare (-1.32%), HCL Tech (-0.98%) faced declines.
news.summary:
Sensex and Nifty opened higher amid diplomacy hopes; Sensex at 79,501.32 (+0.49%), Nifty at 24,607.95 (+0.52%) by 9:45 am.
Coal India (+2.83%), ONGC (+2.67%), Reliance (+2.33%) led gains; Max Healthcare (-1.32%), HCL Tech (-0.98%) faced declines.

news.title:
Cognizant emphasizes superior design over cost-cutting to win AI deals, focusing on fixed-price contracts for certainty.
Infosys, TCS, and HCLTech report AI revenues; Cognizant targets AI market share growth despite automation concerns.
news.summary:
Cognizant emphasizes superior design over cost-cutting to win AI deals, focusing on fixed-price contracts for certainty.
Infosys, TCS, and HCLTech report AI revenues; Cognizant targets AI market share growth despite automation concerns.

news.title:
Jio Financial infused Rs 2,000 crore into Jio Credit for growth; HCLTech signed an MoU with IIT Kanpur for GCC solutions.
Hindalco's Aluchem deal faces US regulatory delay; NTPC, GMDC signed MoUs for coal and lignite resource utilization.
news.summary:
Jio Financial infused Rs 2,000 crore into Jio Credit for growth; HCLTech signed an MoU with IIT Kanpur for GCC solutions.
Hindalco's Aluchem deal faces US regulatory delay; NTPC, GMDC signed MoUs for coal and lignite resource utilization.

news.title:
HCLTech signed MoU with IIT Kanpur for scalable solutions; IRFC board to meet on March 9 for interim dividend.
Hindalco's US acquisition review delayed; BPCL forms Singapore subsidiary; Greaves Cotton expands to Nepal.
news.summary:
HCLTech signed MoU with IIT Kanpur for scalable solutions; IRFC board to meet on March 9 for interim dividend.
Hindalco's US acquisition review delayed; BPCL forms Singapore subsidiary; Greaves Cotton expands to Nepal.

news.title:
HCL Technologies partners with IIT Kanpur to enhance deep tech innovation in AI, robotics, and future tech.
The collaboration focuses on research-driven innovation and faster global product launches.
news.summary:
HCL Technologies partners with IIT Kanpur to enhance deep tech innovation in AI, robotics, and future tech.
The collaboration focuses on research-driven innovation and faster global product launches.

news.title:
Emkay Global revises portfolio, adding Infosys, HCL Tech, Indus Towers, SRF; exits Mphasis, Sun Pharma, Gravita.
It turns marginally overweight on IT sector, citing attractive valuations post AI sell-off; sees 6.5-18.3% return potential.
news.summary:
Emkay Global revises portfolio, adding Infosys, HCL Tech, Indus Towers, SRF; exits Mphasis, Sun Pharma, Gravita.
It turns marginally overweight on IT sector, citing attractive valuations post AI sell-off; sees 6.5-18.3% return potential.

news.title:
Infosys, TCS, and HCL Tech are in focus as Nvidia's Q3 results highlight strong AI demand, boosting opportunities for Indian IT firms.
Nvidia's record $68.1B revenue (+73% YoY) and $42.9B profit emphasize AI's growth, despite market caution on overvaluation risks.
news.summary:
Infosys, TCS, and HCL Tech are in focus as Nvidia's Q3 results highlight strong AI demand, boosting opportunities for Indian IT firms.
Nvidia's record $68.1B revenue (+73% YoY) and $42.9B profit emphasize AI's growth, despite market caution on overvaluation risks.

news.title:
IT stocks lead recovery post Anthropic-triggered selloff; Nifty reclaims 25,500, Sensex gains 485.2 points to trade at 82,711.1.
Infosys, HCLTECH, TCS, TECHM top Nifty gainers; Dr. Reddy's, MAXHEALTH, SBI among losers; FIIs net sellers at ₹102.5 crore.
news.summary:
IT stocks lead recovery post Anthropic-triggered selloff; Nifty reclaims 25,500, Sensex gains 485.2 points to trade at 82,711.1.
Infosys, HCLTECH, TCS, TECHM top Nifty gainers; Dr. Reddy's, MAXHEALTH, SBI among losers; FIIs net sellers at ₹102.5 crore.

news.title:
Emkay Global Financial turns 'Overweight' on Indian IT sector, citing excessive AI-driven tech rout.
Infosys and HCLTech are added as attractive investment opportunities by the brokerage firm.
news.summary:
Emkay Global Financial turns 'Overweight' on Indian IT sector, citing excessive AI-driven tech rout.
Infosys and HCLTech are added as attractive investment opportunities by the brokerage firm.

news.title:
Antique downgraded TCS and HCLTech to 'Hold' due to AI disruption risks.
Factors include global hyperscaler capex surge and rising competitive pressures.
news.summary:
Antique downgraded TCS and HCLTech to 'Hold' due to AI disruption risks.
Factors include global hyperscaler capex surge and rising competitive pressures.

news.title:
Nifty IT index plunged 21% in February, eroding LIC and mutual fund IT holdings by 20%, losing ₹81,000 crore and ₹45,000 crore respectively.
Infosys, TCS, HCL, and mid-tier IT firms like Coforge and KPIT dropped sharply on AI fears, with HSBC forecasting 14-16% sector revenue deflation.
news.summary:
Nifty IT index plunged 21% in February, eroding LIC and mutual fund IT holdings by 20%, losing ₹81,000 crore and ₹45,000 crore respectively.
Infosys, TCS, HCL, and mid-tier IT firms like Coforge and KPIT dropped sharply on AI fears, with HSBC forecasting 14-16% sector revenue deflation.

news.title:
HCL Tech fell 6% as Sensex dropped 1,069 points, closing below 25,450.
Tech Mahindra also declined 6% during the session, as reported by ET Now.
news.summary:
HCL Tech fell 6% as Sensex dropped 1,069 points, closing below 25,450.
Tech Mahindra also declined 6% during the session, as reported by ET Now.

news.title:
HCL Technologies executed a NSE block trade of 576,406 shares.
The trade was valued at Rs. 76.8 crores at Rs. 1,333 per share.
news.summary:
HCL Technologies executed a NSE block trade of 576,406 shares.
The trade was valued at Rs. 76.8 crores at Rs. 1,333 per share.

news.title:
ISM 2.0 launched with Rs. 1,000 crore allocation to boost India's semiconductor sector through domestic manufacturing, R&D, and training.
MIC, MosChip, ASM, and Kaynes reported mixed Q3 FY26 results with revenue growth but declining profitability; HCLTech saw 13% YoY revenue growth.
news.summary:
ISM 2.0 launched with Rs. 1,000 crore allocation to boost India's semiconductor sector through domestic manufacturing, R&D, and training.
MIC, MosChip, ASM, and Kaynes reported mixed Q3 FY26 results with revenue growth but declining profitability; HCLTech saw 13% YoY revenue growth.

news.title:
Infosys, HCL Tech, TCS, and other IT stocks fell up to 3% on Tuesday.
The decline followed Anthropic's claim that its Claude Code tool modernizes COBOL-based systems.
news.summary:
Infosys, HCL Tech, TCS, and other IT stocks fell up to 3% on Tuesday.
The decline followed Anthropic's claim that its Claude Code tool modernizes COBOL-based systems.

news.title:
HCLTech CEO Vijayakumar states AI transition will be painful for IT sector due to human involvement.
He stresses IT's relevance, need for reskilling, and challenges for SaaS firms and hyperscalers ahead.
news.summary:
HCLTech CEO Vijayakumar states AI transition will be painful for IT sector due to human involvement.
He stresses IT's relevance, need for reskilling, and challenges for SaaS firms and hyperscalers ahead.

news.title:
Jefferies downgrades HCL Tech to hold, cutting target price to Rs 1390.
Previous target price of Rs 1885 revised downward by Jefferies.
news.summary:
Jefferies downgrades HCL Tech to hold, cutting target price to Rs 1390.
Previous target price of Rs 1885 revised downward by Jefferies.

news.title:
Jefferies downgraded Infosys, HCLTech, Mphasis, LTIMindtree, TCS, and Hexaware on AI concerns, cutting price targets up to 33%.
Despite YTD declines up to 16%, Jefferies sees more downside. Coforge, Sagility, and IKS Health are its top picks.
news.summary:
Jefferies downgraded Infosys, HCLTech, Mphasis, LTIMindtree, TCS, and Hexaware on AI concerns, cutting price targets up to 33%.
Despite YTD declines up to 16%, Jefferies sees more downside. Coforge, Sagility, and IKS Health are its top picks.

news.title: HCL aims to supply 25% of India's display chips within two years, says Roshni Nadar.
news.summary: HCL aims to supply 25% of India's display chips within two years, says Roshni Nadar.
